SEARCH

Uses of Interface
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.runtime.ProcessInstantiationBuilder

Packages that use ProcessInstantiationBuilder
Package
Description
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
Public API of the Camunda Platform engine.

Typical usage of the API starts by the creation of a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineConfiguration
(typically based on a configuration file), from which a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
can be obtained.

Through the services obtained from such a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
, BPM and workflow operation can be executed:

invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RepositoryService
: Manages
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.repository.Deployment
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RuntimeService
: For starting and searching
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.runtime.ProcessInstance
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.TaskService
: Exposes operations to manage human (standalone)
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.task.Task
s, such as claiming, completing and assigning tasks
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.IdentityService
: Used for managing
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.User
s,
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.Group
s and the relations between them
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ManagementService
: Exposes engine admin and maintenance operations, which have no relation to the runtime execution of business processes
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.HistoryService
: Exposes information about ongoing and past process instances.
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.FormService
: Access to form data and rendered forms for starting new process instances and completing tasks.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
API implementation classes, which shouldn't directly be used by end-users.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.runtime
Classes related to the
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RuntimeService
.

  • Uses of ProcessInstantiationBuilder in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine

    Methods in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine that return ProcessInstantiationBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProcessInstantiationBuilder
    RuntimeService.createProcessInstanceById(String processDefinitionId)
    Returns a fluent builder to start a new process instance in the exactly specified version of the process definition with the given id.
    ProcessInstantiationBuilder
    RuntimeService.createProcessInstanceByKey(String processDefinitionKey)
    Returns a fluent builder to start a new process instance in the latest version of the process definition with the given key.

  • Uses of ProcessInstantiationBuilder in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ProcessInstantiationBuilderImpl
    Simply wraps a modification builder because their API is equivalent.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    ProcessInstantiationBuilder.businessKey(String businessKey)
    Set the business key for the process instance

    Associate a case instance with the process instance

    Specify the id of the tenant the process definition belongs to.
